features: 【Pack of 4 UK to European Plug Adapter】Universal power plug adapter, for use in European during holidays or business trips.UK to Europe travel plug Adapter. EU travel adaptor from UK to Germany, France, Spain, Poland, Norway, and Sweden to,Dubai, Hong Kong, Ireland, etc.. Suitable companion for travel, business trip, vacation, and study abroad.

【Durable and Reliable】EU plug adapter converts the pin of plugs 2 Pin to 3 Pin for connecting Type C/E/F plug .The plug pin is made of copper and the copper nickel plating can effectively avoid oxidation,so the Europe power converter is durable and reliable, maximum extension of the service life. Our EU plug adapter provided with internal shutters (to prevent your child from poking objects into the socket), try plugging upper pin first which will push the barrier down to clear bottom holes.

【Compact and Portable,Current Rating】Herfair EU plug adapter is compact design of Small size of 48mm x 45mmr and light weight 80 gram, our plug adapter for Europe is easy to carry and saves your luggage space, you don't need to take other adapters or sockets.Current rating: 10Amp to 16Amp max, Voltage: 240V~ max. Does not convert voltage or current.These travel plugs only serve to convert a 3 pin Type G into 2 pin Type C, E, F plugs

【Safe UK to Europe Plug Adaptor】EU plug adapters have surge protection and a ground or earth connection; essential safety features as other electrical appliances. You can use these adapters with high powered electricals such as computers, curling tongs, hair dryers, laptops, phones, etc without worry.British standard 3 square pins plug acceptable, make you able to use British appliances on a EU socket.

【You will get】Pack of 4, 2 Black and 2 White 2 colors packed, perfect for people who needs to go to Europe frequently.Note: The adapter does not convert voltage, the EU travel adapter is compatible with Voltage: 240 V; Input / Output:10A/6A. Please check the input rating of your device before using the socket. If your device only supports 240V input, please use with a voltage converter.
